title: Luna's Structure Compass
description: This data-pack adds a structure compass that can go to any structure in the game!
body:
This data-pack adds in a structure compass as an vanilla alternative to /locate, this structure compass can track structures from up to 10k blocks away!

## Summary
- Can locate any structure in the base game (if you want more ask me on github)
- Can be crafted with simple items
- Easy to use | No commands needed

## How it works
This datapack adds a new item (and recipe); the _structure compass_ you can make this with some redstone, diamonds, and a loadstone. You can use this compass by right clicking on it, then it will be replaced with a book which you can open to select a structure, and it will then give you a new compass tracked to that location.

**IMPORTANT! This datapack is designed for each player to only use one compass at a time!**

<details>
<summary>Structures</summary>

- Ancient City
- Bastion
- Buried Treasure
- Desert Temple
- End City
- Igloo
- Jungle Temple
- Mineshaft
- Nether Fortress
- Fossil (Nether)
- Ocean Monument
- Ocean Ruins
- Pillager Outpost
- Ruined Portal (Overworld)
- Ruined Portal (Nether)
- Shipwreck
- Stronghold
- Swamp Hut
- Trail Ruins
- Trial Chambers
- Village
- Woodland Mansion

</details>
